C:\WINDOWS\system32\wsl.exe --distribution Ubuntu --exec /bin/bash -c "export CMAKE_COLOR_DIAGNOSTICS=ON && export CLION_IDE=TRUE && export JETBRAINS_IDE=TRUE && cd '/home/pietrolio/Clion/C++/Activity_Register/cmake-build-debug' && /usr/bin/cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug '-DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=/usr/bin/g++-11' -G 'CodeBlocks - Unix Makefiles' -S '/home/pietrolio/Clion/C++/Activity_Register' -B '/home/pietrolio/Clion/C++/Activity_Register/cmake-build-debug'"
-- Configuring done
-- Generating done
-- Build files have been written to: /home/pietrolio/Clion/C++/Activity_Register/cmake-build-debug
